---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Lunx
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Request

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Motivation

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 📝 Proposed Solution

**Describe the solution you'd like**

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🎯 Use Case

**Describe your use case**

Explain how this feature would be used and who would benefit from it.

Example:
```typescript
// How you'd like to use this feature
import { newFeature } from 'lunx';

newFeature({
  // configuration
});
```

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

**Describe alternatives you've considered**

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Impact

**Who will benefit from this feature?**

- [ ] All Lunx users
- [ ] Users of specific frameworks (which ones?)
- [ ] Plugin developers
- [ ] Enterprise users
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## 🎨 Design/API Proposal

If you have ideas about how this feature should work or what the API should look like, please share:

```typescript
// Example API design
export default defineConfig({
  // Your proposed configuration
});
```

## 📸 Examples/Mockups

If applicable, add screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools that implement similar features.

## 🔗 Related Issues/PRs

Link to any related issues or pull requests:
- #[issue number]

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I have considered how this feature fits with Lunx's philosophy
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional)

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
